title: Incorrect DISTINCT on an indexed query with IN
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE users (id INT PRIMARY KEY AUTO_INCREMENT, name VARCHAR(255), age INT, email VARCHAR(255) UNIQUE);
INSERT INTO users (name, age, email) VALUES ('Alice', 30, 'alice@example.com');
INSERT INTO users (name, age, email) VALUES ('Bob', 25, 'bob@example.com');
SELECT DISTINCT name FROM users WHERE id IN (1, 2);
key_bug_features: DISTINCT on indexed query with IN clause
